title: Sanity-check rebuild of the reverted 0.6.49 baseline
summary: 0.6.51 is a fresh raw-core-player test rung that intentionally rebuilds the reverted 0.6.49 baseline so VR and desktop can be rechecked on a clean version boundary after backing out 0.6.50.
changes: Reasserted the 0.6.49 runtime baseline without the 0.6.50 scrub-feedback experiment.
Stamped a new version boundary so the operator can test the rollback as a clean raw seam instead of reusing older live files.
Updated repo canon so the active live authority clearly points at the 0.6.51 sanity-check rung.
reasoning: The immediate scrub-feedback experiment in 0.6.50 caused a performance decrease and was not worth keeping.
A fresh sanity-check version is safer than reusing 0.6.49 live artifacts when comparing VR and desktop behavior.
operatorVisibleOutcomes: The live raw core-player seam is now a clean 0.6.51 build of the rolled-back baseline.
No new transport, scrub, slideshow, or input behavior is introduced in this slice.
knownIssues: This slice is a verification rung only and does not advance the queued slideshow, volume, or gaze work.
The parked Unity shell dirt remains intentionally outside this version.
